name: Crockpot Country Chicken Rice Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except rice, into the slow cooker in the order listed.
2. Cover and cook on high for 1 hour.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook an additional 8 to 9 hours.
4. One hour before serving, remove chicken and cool slightly.
5. Remove meat from bones and return to the slow cooker.
6. Add rice. Cover and cook an additional hour on high.
